name: Spiced Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the first eight ingredients together in a small bowl.
2. Whisk the sugar and eggs until light in color; stir in the vanilla extract. Sift the dry ingredients over the egg mixture, then fold in gently until the dough is just combined.
3. Follow steps 3 and 4 in the Lemon-Anise Biscotti recipe.
Variation: Macerate 3/4 cup currants (chopped raisins or dates) in 1/4 cup brandy or marsala for at least 1 hour. Drain the macerated ingredients, then fold them into the dough in step 2, adding a teaspoon of the macerating liquid to the dough.
May substitute 3 whole eggs for the 2 large eggs and 2 yolks
